verses.text: Kenkhrea khua-a om pawlpite lakah na a sem, thu upna sungah i sanggamnu Foebe pen mihoih mahmah khat ahihna thu note' theih dingin ka deih hi

Amah pen keimah-a kipan mi tampi-a' dingin lawm hoih mahmah khat ahih manin, Pasian' mite in a hih dingin a kilawm ahih mah bangin Topa' thu sungah mihoihin na sang un la, note' huhding a kisapna khempeuhah hoihtakin na huh un
Khrih Jesuh sungah na ka sepkhoppih Prisilla leh Aquila na hopih sak un
Amaute pen kei-a' dingin a si ngam uh ahi hi. Amaute tungah a lungdam kei guak bek zong hiloin, Gentail pawlpi mi khempeuh zong a lungdam ahi hi
Amau' inn-a kikhawm pawlpi mi khempeuh zong na hopih sak un. Asia gamsungah Khrih thu a um masa penpa ahi ka lawm it mahmah Epainetas zong na hopih sak un
Note-a' dingin nakpi takin na a sem Mary zong na hopih sak un

Jew mipih ahih banah ka thongkiatpih ahi Andronikas leh Junias zong na hopih sak un. Amaute pen kei' Khristian suahma pekin a na suak khinsate na hi uh a, sawltakte khempeuh in a theihkim uh mite ahi uh hi
Topa thu sungah ka lawm it mahmah ahi Ampliatas zong na hopih sak un
Khrih nasepna sungah na ka sepkhoppih uh ahi Urbanas, leh ka lawm Stakhus zong na hopih sak un
Khrih tungah mi citak mahmah ahi Apelles zong na hopih sak un. Aristobulas innkuanpih mite zong na hopih sak un
Jew mipih Herodion leh Narsissas innkuan sunga i Khristian sanggamte zong na hopih sak un
Topa' na a sem Trifana leh Trifosa, leh Topa-a' dingin na tampi tak a sem ka lawm it Persis zong na hopih sak un
Topa' nasepna sungah a kikhai mahmah Rufas, leh ta bangin kei a hong bawl tawntung ama nu zong na hopih sak un
Asinkritas, Flegon, Hermes, Patrobas, Hermas, leh amaute tawh a kikhawm khawm Khristian sanggamte zong na hopih sak un
Filologas leh Julia, Nereas leh a sanggamnu leh Olympas leh amaute tawh a kikhawm khawm Pasian' mi khempeuh zong na hopih sak un
Sanggam ki-itna taktak tawh note khatlekhat kinamin na kihopih un. Khrih pawlpi khempeuh in zong hopihna kam hong khak uh hi
Lawmte aw, note' theihsa thute gensia langpangin, mite' upna nawngkaisakin pawl a kikhensak mite kidawm un. Tua bang mite tawh kikhawl vet kei un
Tua bang mite in i Topa Khrih' na a sem hiloin, gilpi vai bek a sem uh ahi hi. Amaute in mite phatin kamkhum nono zang uh ahih manin mihoih pawlkhat a khemzo uh hi

Lungdamna thu tawh kisai-ah na cihtakna uh mi khempeuh in thei ahih manin hih thu-ah kong lungdampih mahmah hi. A hoih bang hiam, ci-in theihna ding pilna nei-in, a sia peuhmah tawh na kizopkhak hetlohna ding uh kong deihsak hi
Tua hi leh eite tungah nopsakna a hong pia thei Pasian in Satan tuancilin note' khenuai mi hong hisak baih ding hi. I Topa Jesuh Khrih hong hehpihna thupha, note tungah om ta hen
Ka naseppih Timoti in note hong hopih a, Jew mipih Lusias, Jason, leh Sosipater-te in zong hong hopih uh hi
Hih lai a gelhsak keimah Tertias in zong upna kikhat ihihna tawh ka hong hopih hi
Keima zintun'napa leh pawlpite' kikhopna inn neipa zong ahi Gaias in zong hong hopih hi. Ka omna khuapi sumkempa Erastas leh i Khristian sanggam Kuartas in zong hong hopih uh hi
(I Topa Jesuh Khrih hehpihna thupha note khempeuh tungah hong om ta hen. Amen.)
Eite khempeuh in Pasian phat ni. Keima hilh Jesuh Khrih thu ahi Lungdamna Thu leh tanglai-in a ki-imcip, tu-in a kipholak thu-ah, amah pen note' upna a hong kipsak theipa ahi hi
Ahi zongin mi khempeuh in Pasian umin a zuihtheihna dingin tu-in kamsangte' laigelhnate leh a nungta tawntung Pasian' thupiakna tawh tua thu ki-imcip pen a hong kipholak ta ahi hi
Thu khempeuhah pilna a nei, amah bek ahi Pasian in Jesuh Khrih hangin a tawntungin phatna ngah ta hen! Amen.
